Term Dates

2024-2025

Winter: 1/7/25 - 3/21/2025

Spring: 4/1/2025 - 6/13/2025

Summer: 6/24/2025 - 8/22/2025

Winter: 1/6/26 - 3/20/2026

Spring: 3/31/2026 - 6/12/2026

Summer: 6/23/2026 - 8/21/2026

Spring: 3/30/2027 - 6/11/2027

Spring: 4/3/2029 - 6/15/2029

Summer: 6/26/2029 - 8/24/2029
